column2: Assessor Reviews and Sets Defensible Requirements Using Swarm-aware SORA Evidence
column3: ['The assessor accesses the UAS operational authorization application. ', 'The assessor reviews the provided swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'Based on the reviewed SORA evidence, the assessor sets sail and OSO requirements. ', 'The assessor verifies that the set sail and OSO requirements are defensible. ']
column4: ['The assessor is able to open and navigate within the UAS operational authorization application. ', 'The assessor has thoroughly examined all relevant information in the swarm-aware SORA evidence. ', 'The assessor has successfully defined and documented sail and OSO requirements based on the provided SORA evidence. ', 'The assessor confirms that the established sail and OSO requirements meet all relevant regulations, industry standards, and safety guidelines. ']
